meta.title: Time Tracking
meta.description: Simple time tracking with project filters and one-click PDF reports. Track hours per project, filter by date, and export polished timesheet PDFs.
meta.ogAlt: Time tracking with one-click PDF reports

hero.title: Simple time tracking with one-click PDF reports.
hero.subtitle: Track time per project, filter your entries by project and date, and turn any view into a polished, branded PDF report - all from one clean dashboard. No bloat, just the numbers you need.

features.label: What you get
features.heading: Everything you need, nothing you don't.

items.title: Track time per project
items.copy: Log entries against any project and keep a clean, accurate record of where your hours go.

items.title: Filter by project & date
items.copy: Slice your entries by project and date range to see exactly what you worked on, and when.

items.title: Export PDF reports
items.copy: Turn any filtered view into a polished, branded PDF report in a single click - ready to send.

items.title: Your data, your account
items.copy: Everything lives in your own private account. Your time, your projects, your reports - no one else's.

steps.label: How it works
steps.heading: From zero to a sent report in three steps.

items.title: Create your account
items.copy: Sign up in seconds and add the projects you want to track time against.

items.title: Log your hours
items.copy: Add time entries per project as you work, then filter them by project and date.

items.title: Export a report
items.copy: Generate a clean, branded PDF of any filtered view and share it with one click.

cta.heading: Start tracking in under a minute.
cta.copy: Open the dashboard, add a project, and log your first entry. Your first branded PDF report is one click away.
